subject: [DCAE] Remove platform charts and overrides
commit_message:
[DCAE] Remove platform charts and overrides

All platform components has been disabled/deprecated
since Jakarta release

Change-Id: I8837ad4e6b9ef20cd7c94fefd6ec4b9cb7b20b08
Signed-off-by: Vijay Venkatesh Kumar <vv770d@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3002
Signed-off-by: Vijay Venkatesh Kumar <vv770d@att.com>

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5575/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5575/ )
